claim_set.claim: For every natural number n >= 0, the sum of the first n odd positive integers equals n^2.
claim_set.limits: Human-readable induction proof; no proof-assistant kernel certificate in this pass.

claim_set.claim: A bounded incremental Python probe checked n from 0 through 100000 without finding a counterexample.
claim_set.limits: Finite witness only; the induction proof carries the universal claim.

normalized OpenTelemetry-style span fixture into Telos action event
